Video.summary: Experience the intensity of collegiate pickleball as the University of Arkansas "Hogs" face off against UT Dallas in a high-stakes pool play matchup at the NCPA 2025 Dallas Regional. This "best-of-seven" format showcases the full spectrum of the sport, including gender doubles, singles, and mixed doubles, with teams competing for a prize pool and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis.The match features elite collegiate talent, including Arkansasĺ Alison Lee and Yasmine Humbert, who bring high-energy play and powerful forehands to the court. They are met with fierce competition from UT Dallas standouts Chloe Tu, Alex Hayek, and Austin Lee. Watch as the teams battle through momentum shifts and high-speed hand battles at the kitchen line, ultimately leading to a high-pressure sudden death tiebreaker.
Video.title: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Image.alt: Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas
Rockwall Regional Pool Play Match - Arkansas vs. UT Dallas

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced menĺs doubles opener.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 ľ Menĺs Doubles Open Group A Match 1 ľ Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 ľ Menĺs Doubles Open Group A Match 1 ľ Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 ľ Menĺs Doubles Open Group A Match 1 ľ Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 ľ Menĺs Doubles Open Group A Match 1 ľ Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Video.summary: Anna Leigh Waters and James Johnson take on Jorja Johnson and Gabriel Tardio in this Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this Mixed Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Beth Bellamy and Rick Witsken team up with power and precision as they face off against the dynamic duo of Eva Welsher and Altaf Merchant. With each rally more intense than the last, the match showcases expert-level shot placement, quick hands at the kitchen, and the emotional highs and lows of championship pickleball.From thrilling volleys to strategic momentum shifts, this final clash is a must-watch for fans of senior pro competition. Watch as tempers flare, crowds roar, and legends battle for the ultimate title in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 ľ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ľ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant

Image.alt: US Open 2023 ľ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ľ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant
US Open 2023 ľ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ľ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant
US Open 2023 ľ Mixed Sr Pro Doubles Gold ľ Bellamy & Witsken vs Welsher & Merchant

Video.summary: December 19, 2023 - Welcome to The Orchard Cup - CHAMPIONSHIP NIGHT for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and tonight, the #1 seed Gilbert Gladiators (5-0) face the #2 seed Peoria Pythons (4-1).
Video.title: December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL

Video.summary: The atmosphere at Mumbai's Jio World Garden is electric as the host team, Mumbai Pickle Power, rides the momentum of their first season victory into a high-stakes clash against the Rajasthan Titans. With Rajasthan still hunting for their elusive first win of the season, the pressure is at a breaking point for both squads as they fight to climb the "Band of Honor" leaderboard. Witness tactical masterclasses as veteran Lorena Dupnik faces off against Jada Bui in a strategic battle of precision, and feel the intensity of the men's singles where superstars like Brandon Lane and Jack Foster showcase explosive athleticism. From game-changing "Pickle Plays" to high-stakes challenges and the presence of celebrity guests like Rishabh Pant, every rally in this tie is a desperate fight for survival on the road to the semifinals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: Day 4 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) presents a crucial matchup between Pune United and the high-performing Bengaluru Jawans. For Pune, this is a must-win match to keep their semi-final hopes alive, while Bengaluru is on top of their game.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: The stakes reach their absolute peak at Mumbaiĺs Jio World Garden for the first semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2, where there are "no do overs" for the Chennai Super Champs and Pune United. Witness a high-stakes tactical chess match as Chennaiĺs coach Jonny Goldberg makes the bold move to start premier player Rika Fujiwara against the "big and aggressive" Katie Morris in a critical women's singles clash. The intensity continues with a masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the powerful pairing of Lee Hwang Nam and Carlota Trevino facing off against Pune's consistent stars, William Sobeck and Magdalena Gregorio. Every point is a desperate grind for survival as these two titans battle through "world class" rallies for a guaranteed spot in the grand finale.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the high-octane energy of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Bengaluru Jawans go head-to-head with the Rajasthan Titans at the iconic Jio World Garden in Mumbai. The stakes are higher than ever in this Day 9, Tie 16 clash, featuring elite matchups such as the "women's singles player of the season" Katrina Stewart facing off against the resilient Lorena Dupnik. Watch as tactical masters like Dusty Boyer and Jack Foster battle for supremacy in a series of intense singles and mixed doubles competitions where every point counts toward the league standings. With game-changing "Pickle Plays" and atmospheric "drums" fueling the intensity, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit and strategic precision.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Video.summary: Watch as Pickleball Pros Dan Granot and Phillip Phillips, paired with NFL legend Brandon Siler and Pickleball professional Ryan Sherry, battle it out in this thrilling Men's Doubles match from the Picklebowl 2022. Filmed in the stunning Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event brings together celebrities and professional athletes representing their alma maters. The game is not only about competition but also raising funds for a great cause, benefiting Desire Street Ministries. With star power from both the sports and entertainment worlds, this exciting match is filled with hard-hitting shots, strategic play, and thrilling moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles ľ Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles ľ Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles ľ Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles ľ Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Video.summary: Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel teams up with pickleball pro Kyle Yates to take on filmmaker Doug Ellin and pro Wes Burrows in this exciting Picklebowl 2022 semifinal. Set on the scenic courts of Sea Island, Georgia, this match blends high-level pickleball with star power and charitable competition. Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles Semifinal ľ Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles Semifinal ľ Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
Picklebowl 2022 ľ Menĺs Doubles Semifinal ľ Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
